claims.quote: Research CareersResearch CareersWorking with the Houston Methodist Academic Institute, employees have the unique opportunity to be involved in innovative treatments and clinical trials as well as transforming the latest discoveries into practical protocols at the bedside.
claims.claimText: Research Careers section indicates employment opportunities within the Academic Institute — Tier 3 careers signal.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Describes employee/career opportunities at Houston Methodist Academic Institute, a Tier 3 post-trainee signal.
claims.limitations: General careers blurb; no physician-specific role, visa, or sponsorship detail on this page.

claims.claimText: Careers portal lists an MD/DO Jobs category.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: MD/DO job listings are post-trainee attending-physician career opportunities.

claims.quote: Faculty DevelopmentThis section contains tools to help faculty find the necessary expertise and skills to complete their research team needs, develop conferences and seminars, publish articles and identify and apply for funding opportunities.
claims.claimText: Faculty Development resources — Tier 3 faculty-track signal distinct from Research Careers.
claims.limitations: No job role, posting, or sponsorship detail on this page.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Faculty-facing development tools; Tier 3 post-trainee/career resources.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured the Research Careers paragraph (f2) but not the adjacent Faculty Development section.

claims.quote: Houston Methodist Scholars is our network of faculty profiles and collaborations. Scholars provides our faculty with access to a global network of collaborators and subject matter experts, and information about their publication record and key areas of expertise.
claims.claimText: Houston Methodist Scholars faculty collaboration network — Tier 3 faculty-services signal not captured by A1.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Faculty-only collaboration network is a Tier 3 post-trainee service.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 did not register Faculty Directory / Scholars as a separate Tier 3 signal.

claims.quote: The Bookout Center is an innovative virtual hospital and hands-on clinical training facility for health care professionals seeking to maintain and develop new, excellent procedural skills.
